content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 WARN — SettingsView.swift:11 user-facing label "Experimental: may be unstable and lose sort order" describes a shipped feature as experimental/unstable.
Pierre: Apple reviewers may read "Experimental" combined with "may be unstable and lose sort order" as an admission the feature is unfinished, which risks 2.1/2.2 completeness questions even though it's not literal beta/TestFlight language. This is user-visible UI copy, not a code comment, so it should be reworded to something like "New: AI-powered sorting" or clarified as a stable optional feature. Verify the feature actually works reliably before softening the warning, rather than just changing the wording.
